content.full_text:
February 1, 2007

Shelia Young
P.O. Box 3175
San Leandro, CA 94578

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-007

Dear Ms. Young:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹

Per our conversation on January 23, 2007 and in an email dated that same day, you stated that you would no longer need formal written advice due to a vendor error that made your request moot.

Your request for advice has therefore been withdrawn. Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Emelyn Rodriguez
Counsel, Legal Division

ER:jl

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997 of the California Code of Regulations.
